# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES = ['auth-token', 'access-token', 'token'];
const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/login', '/signup', '/forgot-password', '/api/auth'];
const PROTECTED_PATH_PREFIXES = ['/dashboard', '/account', '/settings', '/profile', '/api/protected'];

function getAuthToken(request: NextRequest): string | null {
  for (const name of AUTH_COOKIE_NAMES) {
    const value = request.cookies.get(name)?.value;
    if (value && isValidToken(value)) {
      return value;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

function isValidToken(token: string): boolean {
  if (!token || token.length < 10) return false;

  try {
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length === 3) {
      const payload = JSON.parse(
        Buffer.from(parts[1].replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/'), 'base64').toString('utf8')
      );
      if (payload.exp && Date.now() >= payload.exp * 1000) {
        return false;
      }
    }
  } catch {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some((path) => pathname === path || pathname.startsWith(`${path}/`));
}

function isProtectedPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PROTECTED_PATH_PREFIXES.some(
    (path) => pathname === path || pathname.startsWith(`${path}/`)
  );
}

export function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname, search } = request.nextUrl;
  const token = getAuthToken(request);
  const isAuthenticated = !!token;
  const publicPath = isPublicPath(pathname);
  const protectedPath = isProtectedPath(pathname);

  if (publicPath && isAuthenticated) {
    const redirectUrl = new URL('/dashboard', request.url);
    return NextResponse.redirect(redirectUrl);
  }

  if (protectedPath && !isAuthenticated) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('from', `${pathname}${search}`);
    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
  }

  if (!protectedPath && !publicPath) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  return NextResponse.next();
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/dashboard/:path*',
    '/account/:path*',
    '/settings/:path*',
    '/profile/:path*',
    '/login',
    '/signup',
    '/forgot-password',
    '/api/protected/:path*',
    '/api/auth/:path*',
  ],
};
